Synthetic SDS Fixture: Solvent Cleaner A
Supplier: Synthetic Fixture Laboratory
Revision: 2026-05-06

Section 2 - Hazard Identification
Highly flammable liquid and vapor. Causes serious eye irritation.

Section 4 - First Aid Measures
If in eyes, rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact
lenses if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing.

Section 7 - Handling and Storage
Keep container tightly closed. Use only with adequate ventilation. Keep away
from heat, sparks, open flames, and hot surfaces.

Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
Use local exhaust ventilation when vapor may be generated. Wear splash goggles.
Wear nitrile gloves when handling the liquid.
